FAKE fixture -- mimics the real CMS PTP file layout, fake codes only
Column1/Column2 Edits
Column 1	Column 2	*=in existence	Effective	Deletion	Modifier	PTP Edit Rationale
		prior to 1996	Date	Date	0=not allowed
				*=no data	1=allowed
					9=not applicable
00000	00001		20260101	*	0	fake rationale - never allowed together (test only)
00000	99999		20260101	*	1	fake rationale - modifier allowed (test only)
99998	99999		20260101	20260401	9	fake rationale - deleted edit (test only)
00001	99998		20260101	20260630	1	fake rationale - edit with deletion date (test only)
00000	99998		20260101	*	1	fake rationale - re-added edit, current window (test only)
00000	99998		20250101	20251231	0	fake rationale - old window (test only)
